name: Lecto AI
description: Lecto AI is a machine translation API that provides fast, high-quality text translation between 100+ languages. It supports single and batch translation, automatic language detection, and is optimized for low-latency production use cases.

capabilities.name: translate_text
capabilities.description: Translate a single text string from one language to another. Supports 100+ language pairs with automatic source language detection.

capabilities.name: detect_language
capabilities.description: Detect the language of a given text string. Returns the detected language code and confidence score.

capabilities.name: list_languages
capabilities.description: List all supported languages and their language codes for use with translation endpoints.

capabilities.name: translate_batch
capabilities.description: Translate multiple text strings in a single request. All texts are translated to the same target language. More efficient than multiple single translate calls.
